channel.title: +अनन्त-रङ्गः on रामानुजीये विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +अनन्त-रङ्गः on रामानुजीये विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: 12 lectures
item.description:
विस्तारः (द्रष्टुं नोद्यम्)

Dr. N.S Anantharangacharya Swami delivered 12 lectures on Shri Bashya and these lectures have been compiled in the book “Shri Bashya Upanyasa Manjari” which is in Kannada. I just wanted to do a little kainkaryam and translated the first Upanyasa to English. The article has been reviewed by our Shri Bashya Guru.

Shri Bashya Upanyasa Manjari - Sri Dr. N.S. Anantharangacharya

Avataranike

Na vedaanthath shastram na madhumathanaath daivamadhikam
Na thath bhakthaath thirtham na thadhabhimathaath saathvika padham
Na sathvaadhaarogyam na budhabhajanath bodhajanakam
Na mukthehe saukhyam na dvayavachanathaha kshema karanam
